response.original_title: {{Reverse~Transaction~Guide}} How do I reverse a transaction on Robinhood?
response.overview: Meta Title: How to Reverse a Robinhood Transaction  Meta Description: Need to reverse a Robinhood transaction? Act fast. Learn how to cancel transfers, file disputes, and secure your account. Call 1-888-576-2041 or contact {{1–(888)↯576 ↯(2041)}} right away for help.  Google Snippet ➥ (+1—888—576—2041 🚀  To reverse a transaction on Robinhood, you must act immediately before the funds settle 1-(8.88)-(57.6)-(20.41). First, check your app history to see if the transfer is still pending and cancel it directly. If the transaction has already cleared, or if it was unauthorized, call Robinhood support at 1-888-576-2041 or 1-888⇿(576)⇿2041 right away.
